## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code refactoring
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `blog` — content / blog post
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance

## Test plan
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No TypeScript errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Tested in browser
